title: Harlequin FinServe Research Portal

text:
Account summary: Harlequin is an institutional research group spun out of a mid-size wealth manager. They operate a consolidated knowledge portal used by 1,200 research analysts and downstream quant teams. Primary goal: replace brittle keyword search with vector-backed RAG + reranking to surface internal research, analyst notes, and filings. Strong preference for dedicated GPU pools (predictable latency) and customer-managed KMS.

Key quote on call: "We need sub-100ms median query time for analyst workflows and hard guarantees on residence of EU client data" — Head of Research.

What they care about: indexing scale (currently ~18M docs including slide decks, SEC filings, internal notes), cost per query (target ~$0.002–0.01/query depending on rerank depth), p50/p95 latency targets (p50 < 60ms for vector retrieval + rerank, p95 < 300ms), and tight SLAs for nightly index refreshes. They ...

title: Northstar Support Platform
preview: Northstar is evaluating Redwood to power an LLM-based support agent assist + summarization feature. Key decision criteria: (1) onboarding speed and clarity (TTFS/TTFP), (2) production-safe defaults for streaming + retries/timeouts, (3) predictable cost controls (quotas/budgets + usage analytics), (4) model pinning +...
text: Northstar is evaluating Redwood to power an LLM-based support agent assist + summarization feature. Key decision criteria: (1) onboarding speed and clarity (TTFS/TTFP), (2) production-safe defaults for streaming + retries/timeouts, (3) predictable cost controls (quotas/budgets + usage analytics), (4) model pinning + fallback routing, and (5) security posture (SSO/SAML, audit logs, US data residency, retention controls, KMS). They prefer VPC deployment but may start on Hosted API if security review can proceed in parallel.

title: BluePeak AI
preview: Workload is real-time customer support agent (chat + summarization) with streaming responses. Early production target: ~25 RPS bursts, P95 latency goal < 1.5s for short replies, cost-sensitive but willing to pay for reliability. Wants clear controls for quotas/budgets, and guidance for safe client behavior (timeouts...
text: Workload is real-time customer support agent (chat + summarization) with streaming responses. Early production target: ~25 RPS bursts, P95 latency goal < 1.5s for short replies, cost-sensitive but willing to pay for reliability. Wants clear controls for quotas/budgets, and guidance for safe client behavior (timeouts/retries, streaming reconnect). Preference for sticking to a single pinned model version for the first month; interested in fallback policy once traffic scales.

title: Lattice Search

text:
Account summary
- Enterprise doc-search team building an internal + customer-facing knowledge search experience across tickets, docs, and Slack/Confluence exports.
- Strong preference for a "production launch checklist" they can use as an internal approval artifact (security + platform teams want a clear list of go-live requirements).

Workload / technical fit
- Primary workload: embeddings + reranking for document retrieval; secondary: summarization of retrieved passages.
- Latency: wants p95 < 500ms for rerank on typical query traffic; embeddings batch jobs can be async.
- Model posture: open to Redwood catalog defaults, but wants ability to pin model version and have a defined rollback/fallback policy.
- Observability: wants token/cost breakdown + request tracing hooks; asked specifically how to audit "who changed model settings" and "when".

Security + compliance (main theme)
- Cu...
